figures.caption: Fig. 2: Overview of ScrollScape Framework. ScrollScape reformulates high resolution EAR synthesis as a sequential video panning task. ScanPE re engineers coordinate distributions by mapping global spatial indices (x, y) onto a temporal sequence to ensure structural coherence across massive scales without the repetition typical of standard models.After generating low resolution latents via a hierarchical DiT, the ScrollSR module utilizes video super resolution priors to enhance details frame by frame. Finally, a 3D VAE decoder and frame fusion stage produce seamless, photorealistic panoramas and traditional scrolls at an exceptional 32K resolution.
Table 1: Quantitative comparison. ScrollScape surpasses alternative approaches across all metrics. The best results are bolded.
Fig. 3: Qualitative comparison on 8:1 horizontal panoramic scroll imagery.
